images.name: psychiatry_cognitive_dissonance_enhanced
images.prompt: [Cognitive dissonance], a clear and legible central subject, shot on Leica M11 with 35mm Summilux-M f/1.4, shallow depth of field, fine Kodak Portra 400 grain, organic color. muted editorial color grade, rendered as a tangible photograph with visible texture — photorealistic, emotionally resonant, not abstract or out of focus.
